name: BrioHR
description: Simple & integrated HR tools for management, HR teams, and employees, supported by a community of experts. Learn more about BrioHR

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Smooth and quick set up. Great UX Real time access for all in the company with all relevant information. One click leave management. Awesome and dynamic org chart.
reviews.review_cons: Waiting for the succession planning module to be build.

reviews.review_description: Overall, BrioHR is a user-friendly, customizable, and scalable HR management solution that help us streamline our processes, improve efficiency while making our daily job more funHighly recommended
reviews.review_pros: User friendly, robust reporting and integrations with other apps.Its customization were tailored to our needs
reviews.review_cons: I wish the mobile app had all same features than the desktop version. Maybe it is on their roadmap

reviews.review_description: Fantastic--customer support is great, the journey to using BrioHR is easy and convenient; the platform truly serves our talent needs.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to understand, easy to use; keeps track of employees seamlessly.
reviews.review_cons: There are many features that can still be added to improve the comprehensiveness and seamlessness of the platform; i.e. historical data.

reviews.review_description: Excellent. Save me time and cost by less paperwork.
reviews.review_pros: As an HR professional, I rely heavily on data to make informed decisions about talent management. BrioHR's analytics module has been a game-changer for me in this regard. With its powerful features and user-friendly interface, I am able to generate relevant data regarding turnover and forecast recruitment needs.The analytics module is very easy to use and provides detailed insights into various HR metrics. I am able to generate custom reports and dashboards that give me a clear picture of our organization's performance over time. This has been invaluable in identifying trends and areas that need improvement.I am now able to identify upcoming talent gaps and plan ahead. This has helped me to be proactive in my recruitment efforts and avoid any unexpected shortages.Overall, I highly recommend BrioHR's analytics module to any HR professional who wants to leverage data to make informed decisions about talent management. It's user-friendly, powerful, and has all the features you need to generate relevant data and forecast recruitment needs.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing. Every features seems to be very helpful at the moment.

reviews.review_title: Highly Recommend BrioHR if you are looking to simplify your Expense Claims processes
reviews.review_description: Saved me so much time submitting and getting my expense claims approved!
reviews.review_pros: As a business development executive, I'm always on the move, and managing my expenses can be a headache. However, since I started using Briohr's expense claims module, I've found the process to be much more straightforward.What's more, the module is incredibly flexible, allowing me to submit claims from my desktop or on-the-go using the mobile app. I can also upload receipts and supporting documents, which makes it easy to keep a record of my expenses.Overall, I would highly recommend Briohr's expense claims module to any business development executive or frequent traveler looking to streamline their expense management process. It's easy to use, flexible, and has saved me a lot of time and hassle.
reviews.review_cons: No cons, simple to understand, easy to use interface, what's there not to like?

reviews.review_pros: I have been using BrioHR's recruitment module for the past few months. I must say, I am impressed with its features and functionality.The user interface is simple and easy to use, which is a big plus for me. I appreciate how the module is customizable to suit the specific needs of our company's recruitment process. We have been able to streamline our hiring process, saving us time and effort.One of my favorite feature is the ability to schedule interviews and send automated emails to candidates. This has greatly reduced our administrative burden and has made the hiring process much more efficient.Overall, I would highly recommend BrioHR's recruitment module to any company looking to streamline their hiring process. It has definitely made our recruitment process much more efficient, saving us time and resources.
reviews.review_cons: No cons. Overall, it is a great software

reviews.review_pros: I have been using BrioHR's leave management module for several months now and it has been a game-changer for me as a graphic designer. Planning and requesting time off is now effortless and stress-free.The leave module is easy to use and provides all the necessary information to make informed decisions about when to take leave. I appreciate the transparency and accuracy of the system, which allows me to view my remaining leave balance and my leave history. This helps me to plan my time off more effectively and avoid any misunderstandings.The system is also very intuitive, and I was able to get started with it right away. The leave requests are automatically routed to my manager for approval, and I receive notifications when it is approved or rejected.
reviews.review_cons: None so far! I am very happy with the product, for me personally, it has been a great experience!

reviews.review_pros: I recently joined a new company and was introduced to BrioHR's onboarding module. I must say that my onboarding experience was one of the smoothest and most enjoyable I've had, and it's all thanks to BrioHR's onboarding module.The onboarding module is very user-friendly and provides all the necessary information to get started at my new company. I was able to complete all the necessary paperwork and training modules online, which made the process quick and efficient. The module also provided me with all the information I needed to get to know my team and the company culture.One thing I appreciated about BrioHR's onboarding module was the personalized experience. The module provided me with a tailored onboarding experience. This made me feel valued as an employee and helped me to hit the ground running.Overall, I would highly recommend BrioHR's onboarding module to any company looking to streamline their onboarding process. It's user-friendly, efficient, and provides a personalized experience for new hires. Thanks to BrioHR, I was able to get up to speed quickly and start contributing to my team's success right away."
reviews.review_cons: None. it's a great software company and Im very happy with it

reviews.review_title: BrioHR has been a pleasant experience
reviews.review_pros: As a project manager, I need to keep track of my team's time to ensure we are on schedule and on budget. BrioHR's time tracking module has been a lifesaver for me in this regard. With its intuitive interface and powerful features, I am able to track my team's time effortlessly.The time tracking module is very user-friendly and easy to navigate. My team members can easily log their time and activities, and I can view their timesheets in real-time. This helps me to stay on top of our progress and make any necessary adjustments to our schedule.One thing I appreciate about BrioHR's time tracking module is its accuracy. The system automatically calculates billable and non-billable hours, which has helped me to ensure that we are billing our clients accurately.I recommend BrioHR's time tracking module to anyone who wants to keep track of their team's time effectively. It's user-friendly, accurate, and has all the necessary features to ensure that you stay on schedule
reviews.review_cons: There hasn't been anything yet that caused any unpleasantness, very friendly CS Team

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, I would recommend it to others.
reviews.review_pros: I recently joined a new company as an Operations Associate and was introduced to Briohr's onboarding module during my orientation. I have to say, it was an incredibly smooth and efficient process.The module was very user-friendly and intuitive, and the steps were laid out in a logical order that made it easy to understand what was expected of me. I appreciated how each task had a clear deadline and was linked to relevant documents and resources.One feature that stood out to me was the ability to track my progress and see where I was in the onboarding process at any given time. This was helpful in ensuring that I didn't miss any important steps or deadlines.Overall, I would highly recommend Briohr's onboarding module to any company looking for a streamlined and effective way to onboard new employees. It made my transition into my new role seamless and stress-free.
reviews.review_cons: None so far. It is an excellent software.

reviews.review_description: Overall I’m happy with this product. Will continue to use it. And introduce to my customer and other friend.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of using, as a payroll user, I can easily access all the payroll information I need. from payslip, EA form, past year, whole year data, leave and claims submission.
reviews.review_cons: To have time management module with clock in function.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: One of the things I love about BrioHR's performance module is its ability to set clear and measurable goals for each team member. This not only helps me to track their progress but also motivates them to work towards achieving their goals. The system also allows me to give feedback and recognition to team members in real-time, which has helped to boost their morale and improve their overall performance.
reviews.review_cons: Not that i can think of at this point but i think overall it's quite decent

reviews.review_pros: BrioHR has a top-notch product & services for a company serving SMB/Mid-market customers. They rely on a team of sharp, professional and passionate people always willing to go the extra mile to deliver outstanding customer experience. Love it
reviews.review_cons: Nothing much except maybe their global presence (at the moment) but I know they are working on it so I'm not worried about their capacity to be ready when needed.

reviews.review_pros: The portal is very easy to use, as one of the admins of the system, I can access to many functions such as Recruitment, Employee Leaves, and even Onboarding staff. I can also manage many things in the same portal which helps a lot in my routine work. Besides, when I encounter any issues or concerns with the system, the helpdesk personnel answer/assist me quickly and effectively.
reviews.review_cons: They always enhance the system to let the users have a better experience, thus we constantly have to learn new things from their portal - sometimes we may not have the time to do so. Nevertheless, BrioHR works great and it is useful.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Eventhough we ended up not contracting BrioHR (we got acquired by a MNC already using a Global HR Mgt platform), my experience with BrioHR has been outstanding. Their quest to match their solution with the clients needs, adaptability, availability and approachability make BrioHR and their leadership team very unique in the market place. I do believe they have cracked the code for such platform and their product/market match will turbo charge their expansion pace undoubtedly.
reviews.review_pros: I was involved in the short listing of BrioHR in the view to consolidate all of our HR applications under one platform. BrioHR is an all inclusive HR management platform from prospect screening to de-boarding. Its executive level reporting and analytics make it a very unique offering in the market place.
reviews.review_cons: Bring in its very fast expansion phase BrioHR will release multiple versions over the initial usage phase, However this will also bring additional functions likely usable and useful for the end users

reviews.review_pros: everything in 1 software (recruitment, leave) --> this is very helpful for HR
reviews.review_cons: - hmm maybe the leave should be exact number (not in commas) - salary slip :D

reviews.review_description: Excellent. Very happy with this new tool overall.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use: the tool is very well designed, smooth onboarding (!) of the new user. Talent management and onboarding features - which are key to the success of a company - are especially well thought.
reviews.review_cons: Overall no regret compared with software I previously used. One suggestion: make the tool available in other languages so as to promote cultural integration across countries / continents.

reviews.review_title: Very convenient and friendly HR software
reviews.review_description: So far we are more than happy with the software. We save precious time when it comes to process payroll and organize recruitment for our company.
reviews.review_pros: BrioHR is a very user friendly software. The overall user experience is nice and you can easily find the information you need. In addition their customer support is very proactive, helpfull and available.
reviews.review_cons: I would think there is no cons to this software. So far it includes all the options and modules that we need.

reviews.review_title: The one-stop HR solution in the market
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: The onboarding is part of the software and is a seamless experience
reviews.review_cons: Nothing I really disliked so can’t really answer the question

reviews.review_description: I have been using Brio for more than 6 months now, and I must say that it has been a game-changer for our organization. The platform has transformed the way we manage our HR processes, making them more streamlined and efficient than ever before. With Brio HRMS, we are now able to manage, and leave attendance and performance evaluations with ease, all in one central location.The platform provides us with detailed insights into our workforce, which allows us to make informed decisions about recruitment, training, and retention strategies. This has helped us to optimize our HR processes and improve employee engagement, resulting in increased productivity and overall success for our organization.
reviews.review_pros: 1. Real-time data analytics: helps HR teams to make informed decisions about training, and retention strategies, which ultimately leads to a more efficient and effective HR management process.2. Customization: Brio provides flexible options to customize workflows, forms, fields, and reports, which allows us to create a personalized HRMS that aligns with our business requirements
reviews.review_cons: 1. Integration challenges: Brio may face integration challenges with other software solutions that are already in use within an organization. Integrating the platform with existing systems may require additional development efforts. 2. Payroll feature is only available for specific countries.

reviews.review_description: It has been very great, I love the swift responses of the Brio team when we need help, every week there is a new feature added and we get alerts. I love that they incorporate changes we request for in order to accommodate our needs. Am most grateful for the PMS because the process we used was time consuming and did not cover much ground (e.g not including 360 feedback), but now process is swift. helps the team stay UpToDate with projects and their progress
reviews.review_pros: It is a very user friendly software, quick implementation and easy to use. The only system we found that had all we need at a very reasonable price. The performance management has by far been the most feature we have used and it has prompts and reminders that help the team to not miss deadline.
reviews.review_cons: Payroll incorporate for us being in a different continent would be lovely as we love the feature. feed interaction by all staff (ability to engage with post) would also be a nice feature

reviews.review_description: Dealing with BrioHR was easy from the start and efficient. HR services are really important for employee satisfaction and retention, especially in a startup environment. BrioHR took away a lot of the pain and delivered the right level of quality we needed with minimum efforts on our side.
reviews.review_pros: The follow up after our initial request was quick and comprehensive. The initial demo was done with a focus on our situation and requirements. The team took the time to really show us the efficient way to work.Our employees found it easy as the main HR features are in one place for them (payslip, expenses, leave). We have not yet used all modules but it is comforting to know that they are there whenever we will need them.
reviews.review_cons: The initial set of information required to set it up was a bit tedious but necessary, i guess, whichever Saas is selected, and makes life easier since BrioHR performs the data entry for us from excel files.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: So far, our experience using BrioHR has been great. Some manual processes are now automized which has increased work efficiency. Most importantly, data is better stored now and is visible and available to facilitate related deision making process.
reviews.review_pros: BrioHR provides a central platform for communication between employees and HR teams which includes company announcements, updates, and performance feedback. It helps to increase transparency as well as it provides visibility into employee data, including attendance, leave balances, and performance metrics. This enables managers to make data-driven decisions and identify areas for improvement.
reviews.review_cons: I believe that BrioHR can be made more interactive and fun to use. This is especially to appeal to the younger generations of employees. One of the things that can be included is the gamification element.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: I have been using the timesheet module of Briohr to track time spent on legal projects, and found it to be a highly efficient and user-friendly tool. Briohr's time tracking module is seamlessly integrated with their HR management software, which makes it easy to manage and track employee time and attendance.One of the standout features of Briohr's timesheet module is its ability to track time spent on specific legal projects. This has been invaluable in helping me accurately bill clients for the time spent on their cases. The module allows me to easily assign tasks to individual employees, set hourly rates, and track time spent on each task. Additionally, it provides detailed reports on employee productivity and time spent on different projects, which has been very useful for project management and budgeting purposes.Another great feature of Briohr's timesheet module is its flexibility. It allows me to set up different billing rates for different clients, which is very helpful when working with clients who have different pricing structures. It also lets me set up different billing rates for different types of work, such as legal research or drafting contracts. This flexibility has allowed me to more accurately track and bill for the time I spend on each project.Overall, I highly recommend Briohr's time tracking module to any legal specialist looking for a reliable and efficient way to track time spent on legal projects. Its user-friendly interface, project-specific trackin
reviews.review_cons: Did not find anything negative about BrioHR

reviews.review_title: Very powerful HR solution for mid-sized companies
reviews.review_pros: I have been using BrioHR for more than a year. I worked before for big-size companies using solutions such as Workday and Workable. I was impressed with BrioHR as this offers us similar features but with a much simpler solution well suited for mid-sized companies. The recruiting solution for instance is easy to use and we channel all our recruitment through this tool and we save a lot of time in selecting the right candidate and managing the overall recruitment process. Finally, the solution is one of the most affordable solutions on the market. As we have 200 people, we can't spend 20 000 USD a year on ATS and HR solution !
reviews.review_cons: We are planning international development and it would help to have BrioHR in more languages (spanish for instance)
